title: Hungary lifts block on Ukraine’s E.U. bid, but long timeline could put Kyiv at risk
summary_full: Hungary agreed to drop its opposition to opening the formal access talks but is still opposed to the fast-track membership process that Ukraine says it needs as protection from Russia.
summary_public: Hungary agreed to drop its opposition to opening the formal access talks but is still opposed to the fast-track membership process that Ukraine says it needs as protection from Russia.

HU.label: mixed
HU.evidence: Hungary lifts block on Ukraine’s E.U. bid, but long timeline
